name: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
eligibility: Small & marginal landholding farmer families with cultivable land

name: Ayushman Bharat (PM-JAY)
eligibility: Economically weaker / SECC-listed families, low-income households

name: PM Awas Yojana (Gramin/Urban)
eligibility: Homeless or households without a pucca house, EWS/LIG income group

name: National Scholarship (NSP) — Post Matric
eligibility: SC/ST/OBC/Minority or low-income students in class 11 and above

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension
PM Ujjwala Yojana
benefit: Free LPG connection + first refill & stove support
eligibility: Adult women from BPL / low-income households without an LPG connection

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefit: High-interest savings account for a girl child (tax-free)
eligibility: Parents/guardians of a girl child below age 10

name: PM Mudra Yojana
eligibility: Non-corporate small/micro enterprises and aspiring entrepreneurs

name: e-Shram Card (Unorganised Workers)
benefit: Accident insurance ₹2,00,000 + access to welfare schemes
eligibility: Unorganised sector workers aged 16–59 (labourers, vendors, gig workers)
